title: Coach Tan Kim Her's Strategy for Hari-Arjun Doubles Pair
indian_angle: This article delves into the strategic coaching decisions that led to the formation of a promising new Indian men's doubles pair.
summary: Doubles coach Tan Kim Her's insights on pairing Hariharan Amsakarunan and Arjun M.R. are explored, following the success of Satwik-Chirag.

title: Ayush Shetty Challenges World No 15 Weng Hong Yang
indian_angle: Young Indian talent Ayush Shetty pushed a top-ranked Chinese opponent, demonstrating his growing prowess on the international circuit.
summary: Ayush Shetty delivered a strong performance against Chinese World No 15 Weng Hong Yang, denying him an easy match.

title: Sindhu, Arjun-Hariharan Advance to Indonesia Open Round 2
indian_angle: Indian shuttlers PV Sindhu and the men's doubles pair of Arjun and Hariharan successfully navigated their opening matches at the Indonesia Open.
summary: PV Sindhu and the men's doubles pair of Arjun and Hariharan secured their spots in the second round of the Indonesia Open.

title: India Invites Expression of Interest for BWF World Championships 2026
indian_angle: India is actively preparing to host the prestigious BWF World Championships in 2026, signaling a significant event for Indian badminton.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has issued an Expression of Interest for the upcoming BWF World Championships 2026, indicating India's role in organizing the global event.

title: Grassroot Coaches Development Program Announced for June
indian_angle: This program highlights BAI's commitment to strengthening badminton at the grassroots level across India by training new coaches.
summary: A Coaches Development Program at the grassroot level is scheduled for June 12-21, 2026, in Guwahati and Raipur, aiming to enhance coaching expertise.

title: Satwik-Chirag Win Singapore Open Title
indian_angle: India's top men's doubles pair secured a major BWF Super 750 title, showcasing their dominance on the international stage.
summary: Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty clinched the Singapore Open title with furious rallies and celebratory dances, marking a significant victory on the international stage.
